description: Hector (Infantry) + Reina (Lancer) + Greg (Marksman) full 3-hero Tier-1 combo. Hector has chance infantry skills; Reina is deterministic lancer buffs; Greg has 20% chance S1. All three hero classes covered. Tests full-lineup buff stacking across all troop types. RNG due to Hector and Greg — run 5 battles.
